title: Heroku Router
description: An HTTP request log line emitted by the Heroku router and ingested via a Heroku log drain. Detected by proc_id == 'router'. Fields are parsed from the Heroku router log format.

event_type.description: Event type derived from the log source.

proc_id.description: Heroku process identifier — always 'router' for this event.

dyno.description: Dyno that handled the request, e.g. "web.1".

connect.description: Time in milliseconds to establish the connection.

service.description: Time in milliseconds the dyno spent processing the request.

bytes.description: Number of bytes returned in the response.
